title: clinopodium cymuligerum
intro: Clinopodium cymuligerum, also known as Mountain Mint, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and is used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium cymuligerum include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Clinopodium cymuligerum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its versatility and effectiveness.
